underlying_goal: Add candle drill-down functionality from histogram bins in a signals analysis page, with per-pair breakdowns and proper UI components
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly chose wrong architectural approaches (slow recomputation, bloated JSON storage, custom popover instead of reusing existing components) requiring user correction, and misunderstood UI requests multiple times (replacing popover vs embedding DataTable inside it).
brief_summary: User wanted candle drill-down from histogram bins with per-pair breakdowns; achieved after significant friction from Claude's repeated wrong approaches and UI misunderstandings.
